chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Obligation of Shortening the Fast During Travel

text: 1980 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ يُفْطِرُ اَلرَّجُلُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ إِلاَّ بِسَبِيلِ حَقٍّ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1980 - Imam (as) said:
"A man should not break his fast in the Month of Ramadan except for a rightful cause."
